sections.section_name: Model Details: Person or organization developing model

sections.incorrect_information: Embeddings tying is misstated: by default tie_word_embeddings=True (configuration_mpt.py, modeling_mpt.py). The model ties input and output embeddings by default; the card claims they are not tied by default. All other architecture details match the files.

Precision claim is not fully supported: config.json sets torch_dtype to bfloat16 (storage/load dtype), but there is no evidence the model was trained in bfloat16. Other items (initialization scheme, dropout settings, no_bias) are supported.

sections.section_name: Model Details: Paper or other resource for more information

sections.incorrect_information: The repository includes hf_prefixlm_converter.py, but it converts specific HF GPT models (GPT-2/Neo/NeoX/J), not the MPT model itself. MPT supports Prefix LM via attn_config.prefix_lm (configuration_mpt.py, modeling_mpt.py). The card implies conversion for this model via that script.
The claim about intended users (developers and researchers) is not stated in the repository files; it cannot be verified from the provided files.
The repository does not list out-of-scope uses (correct), but additional guidance about factual accuracy/harms is not present in the files and cannot be verified.

The snippet comments that the model was trained in bfloat16; training precision is not evidenced by the files. Other details (trust_remote_code=True, tokenizer EleutherAI/gpt-neox-20b, eos_token_id=0) are supported.

sections.section_name: Memory or Hardware Requirements: Loading Requirements
sections.incorrect_information:
- VRAM requirement of “at least 14 GB” is not stated in the repository files.
- The claim that using fc_type: te requires NVIDIA H100 GPUs is inaccurate; the config notes that TE layers support FP8 on H100 and require specific software (TransformerEngine and FlashAttention v1.0.6), but does not require H100 GPUs (configuration_mpt.py). Other points (disk size ~13.3 GB; CUDA GPU needed for triton/flash; triton-pre-mlir requirement) are supported.

sections.section_name: Memory or Hardware Requirements: Deploying Requirements
Memory or Hardware Requirements: Training or Fine-tuning Requirements

sections.incorrect_information: It is correct that the repository does not include ethical or data source details, but the statements about general LLM risks are not drawn from the repository files and cannot be verified from them.

The recommendation to “Ensure that inputs are right-padded for batch generation” contradicts the code, which explicitly does not support generation with right padding (modeling_mpt.py). Other recommendations (prefer flash over triton when not using Prefix LM; init_device='meta' with FSDP) are supported.
